title: heraclea capillata
intro: Heraclea capillata, also known as bugloss or common bugloss, is a perennial plant belonging to the borage family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects, which make it useful for treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Heraclea capillata include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can also be used in cooking, although its bitter flavor is often masked by blending it with other herbs.
